overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player traverses elevated walkways, follows an NPC, and crosses intersections surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway following a large NPC in yellow pants ahead

notable_agents.action: large character wearing yellow pants walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with support columns
large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with blue hair
cluster of bright neon signs and storefronts lining the right side
metal safety railing separating walkway from drop to lower level

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated concrete walkway beneath a massive highway overpass in a dense cyberpunk city. Neon signs illuminate the right side while a large holographic billboard dominates the left. The player follows a large NPC wearing distinctive yellow pants who walks ahead in the same direction.

events.description: passes the large NPC in yellow pants on the right side
crosses the street at the yellow-striped crosswalk toward a green holographic display

agents.ego_description: overtaking the NPC and crossing the intersection toward a large green holographic cube

entered.detail: massive glowing green holographic cube displaying abstract patterns suspended over the street
yellow zebra-striped pedestrian crossing spanning the wet asphalt road
bright pink neon sign for a diner establishment

segments.scene_description: The player overtakes the large NPC and emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection. A massive green holographic cube glows ahead as the player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene opens up to the night sky while neon signs continue to illuminate the surrounding buildings.

events.description: construction barriers appear prominently on both sides of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing various pedestrians including one with a black umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: silver metal construction barriers with red stripes lining the left side
yellow plastic construction barriers blocking off the right side of the street
ground-level commercial storefronts with bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: The player continues down a commercial street lined with neon-lit shops. Construction barriers begin to appear on both sides, narrowing the walkway. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one figure carrying a black umbrella. The environment feels more enclosed as buildings rise on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone corridor with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing through the construction-barrier-lined corridor toward distant neon lights

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERCLOCK' text with purple and white coloring

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the construction zone, with metal and yellow barriers now flanking the path closely. A large 'PURE OVERCLOCK' billboard dominates the right side. The street continues into the distance, lined with towering neon advertisements and overhead highway structures, maintaining the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked metropolis, moving from a sheltered overpass into an open intersection and finally into a narrow construction zone. It begins on an elevated concrete walkway beneath a massive highway, following a large NPC in yellow pants past glowing neon signs and a dominant holographic billboard. As the player overtakes the NPC, the scene opens up into a wide intersection where the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a massive, glowing green holographic cube under the night sky. The path then shifts into a commercial street lined with neon shops and pedestrians, gradually becoming more enclosed as construction barriers begin to flank the walkway. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this restricted zone, passing a large Pure Overclock billboard while towering advertisements and overhead highway structures loom over the dense urban corridor.
